name: Jinzhou Jixiang Molybdenum Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinzhou Jixiang Molybdenum Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in mining, smelting, processing, production, and sale of molybdenum products for steel mills in China. It provides moly metallurgical products, such as molybdenum alloy, oxide powder, and concentrates; and molybdenum chemical products, including ammonium molybdate and tetramolybdate, molybdenum trioxide and dioxide, and molybdenum powder. The company also offers molybdenum metal products comprising molybdenum wires, plates, rods, heads, electrodes, sheets, components, alloy mandrel, crucibles, and targets. It also sells its products in approximately 30 countries, including the United States, Russia, Britain, the Netherlands, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, and other countries. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Jinzhou, China.
